hub: kosha (Gasuns Sanskrit Dictionary) — the Sanskrit data-hub
note_for_agents: This is the ONE machine-readable list of canonical derived Sanskrit datasets across the ~85 repos. Before deriving an alignment/frequency/headword/crosswalk asset, check here. tier=public assets are downloadable from the interim_release URL; tier=restricted assets exist but are not published (rights-encumbered or unbackuped local-only) — consult their source repo. A session that creates or changes a derived dataset MUST add/update its row here in the same pass.

datasets.title: MW verbal-root inventory
datasets.keying: SLP1 root + explicit verb_type (750 genuineroot + 1363 root)
datasets.notes: 3 repos independently re-scanned mw.txt before this existed (got 750/809/1163) — consume this, never re-scan.

datasets.title: Headword→root derivation table (Pāṇinian, 10 dicts)
datasets.notes: Derivations, distinct from the root inventory (mw-roots).

datasets.title: DCS lemma ↔ CDSL headword crosswalk
datasets.keying: DCS lemma id ↔ CDSL headword (SLP1), 81.4% linked
datasets.notes: Reusable LOD linkset — never re-derive DCS↔CDSL joins.

datasets.title: Cross-dictionary union headword index
datasets.notes: THE headword master — 323k headwords across all dicts.

datasets.title: MW ↔ Heritage (INRIA) entry-level crosswalk
datasets.keying: MW entry id → Heritage anchor (25,140 covered, 97.6% anchor-resolved)
datasets.notes: Crosswalk itself is ours/publishable; the Heritage mirror data behind it is LGPLLR-pending (restricted tier).

datasets.title: DCS lemma frequency sidecar (whole-corpus + per-period)
datasets.keying: SLP1 lemma; whole-corpus counts + per-period vectors + core-vocab coverage
datasets.builder: kosha DCS M9 join against union_headwords
datasets.notes: LEFT-JOIN this — never re-derive frequency ordering. ⚠ upstream UD Tense=Past conflates aorist/perfect.

datasets.title: Zaliznyak-style compact grammar-token index over all PWG
datasets.notes: FAIR data package; paradigms generated via vidyut, never transcribe static tables.

datasets.title: Sa→Ru word-aligned corpus lexicon
datasets.keying: SLP1 surface key (~190k keys), per verse-pair alignment
datasets.notes: RIGHTS: aligns PUBLISHED Russian translations — not publishable as-is. BACKUP GAP: registered asset existing in exactly one place. P-D2/H233.

datasets.title: Ranked Sa→Ru glossary (surface/lemma/root layers)
datasets.keying: SLP1; surface 190,838 · lemma 40,370 · root 2,021; 87% token coverage
datasets.source_path: bulk layers gitignored; ranked site data tracked
datasets.notes: Derived from corpus-lexicon → same rights caveat for bulk layers. Site-served ranked subset is public.

datasets.title: kosha unified lookup database
datasets.keying: 9 tables: 444,773 entries · 323,425 lemmas · 692,403 senses · 1,378,401 forms · 6,916,522 inflections
datasets.source_path: data/db/kosha.db (GITIGNORED — regenerable via scripts/build_db.py chain, but hours of compute)
datasets.notes: Regenerable but expensive; backup = cheap insurance. Candidate single queryable DB for P-D5.

datasets.title: DCS 2026 full corpus database
datasets.notes: DCS upstream is CC BY 4.0; regenerable from CoNLL-U but the ingest is the canonical one — 5 repos historically re-parsed. P-D2/H233.

datasets.title: SamudraManthanam Sa↔Ru verse-parallel corpus
datasets.notes: RIGHTS: contains published RU translations — restricted. Single-copy backup gap. P-D2/H233.

datasets.title: Sanskrit Heritage (INRIA) local mirror
datasets.keying: Heritage entry anchors; VH↔SLP1 bridge validated
datasets.notes: LGPLLR rights @DECIDE pending — restricted until ruled. Upstream mirror exists on GitHub, so no backup urgency.

datasets.title: Böhtlingk Indische Sprüche subhāṣitas
datasets.notes: Already tracked+public in its repo; listed for discovery, not re-released.

datasets.title: DCS akshara/varṇa/ligature frequency tables
datasets.keying: akshara 7,347 · varṇa 48 · conjunct 999; corpus-wide + per DCS time-slot
